mapper.select: WITH time_series AS ( SELECT generate_series( date_trunc('hour', #{start}::timestamptz), date_trunc('hour', #{end}::timestamptz), '1 hour'::interval ) AS time_bucket ), hourly_data AS ( SELECT date_trunc('hour', collected_at) AS time_bucket, COALESCE(AVG(blockers_per_hour), 0) AS avg_blockers FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND blockers_per_hour IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', collected_at) ) SELECT TO_CHAR(ts.time_bucket, 'HH24:MI') AS hourLabel, COALESCE(ROUND(hd.avg_blockers)::INTEGER, 0) AS blockersCount FROM time_series ts LEFT JOIN hourly_data hd ON ts.time_bucket = hd.time_bucket ORDER BY ts.time_bucket

WITH latest_metrics AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (table_name) database_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(table_name), ''), 'table_' || database_id::TEXT) AS table_name, bloat_bytes, bloat_ratio, dead_tuple_total, collected_at FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND table_name IS NOT NULL AND bloat_ratio IS NOT NULL AND bloat_bytes IS NOT NULL AND bloat_bytes > 0 ORDER BY table_name, collected_at DESC ) SELECT database_id AS databaseId, table_name AS tableName, bloat_bytes AS bloatBytes, bloat_ratio AS bloatRatio, COALESCE(dead_tuple_total, 0) AS deadTuples FROM latest_metrics WHERE bloat_ratio > 0 ORDER BY bloat_ratio DESC, bloat_bytes DESC LIMIT #{limit}

WITH recent_blockers AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (table_name) database_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(table_name), ''), 'table_' || database_id::TEXT) AS table_name, blockers_per_hour, blocked_seconds_per_hour, collected_at FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND table_name IS NOT NULL AND blockers_per_hour > 0 AND blocked_seconds_per_hour > 0 ORDER BY table_name, collected_at DESC ) SELECT database_id AS databaseId, table_name AS tableName, (10000 + (database_id * 100 + ROW_NUMBER() OVER ())::INTEGER) AS pid, CASE WHEN blockers_per_hour >= 2 THEN 'AccessExclusiveLock' WHEN blockers_per_hour >= 1 THEN 'ShareUpdateExclusiveLock' ELSE 'ShareLock' END AS lockType, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - collected_at))::BIGINT + (blockers_per_hour * 3600)::BIGINT) AS transactionAge, ROUND(blocked_seconds_per_hour)::BIGINT AS blockDuration, CASE WHEN blockers_per_hour >= 2 THEN 'idle in transaction' ELSE 'active' END AS queryState FROM recent_blockers ORDER BY blockers_per_hour DESC, blocked_seconds_per_hour DESC LIMIT 10

WITH latest_wraparound AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (database_id) database_id, wraparound_progress_pct, collected_at FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND wraparound_progress_pct IS NOT NULL AND wraparound_progress_pct > 0 ORDER BY database_id, collected_at DESC ) SELECT database_id AS databaseId, wraparound_progress_pct AS wraparoundProgressPct FROM latest_wraparound ORDER BY wraparound_progress_pct DESC, database_id LIMIT 5
